cards.title: Recognise
cards.visual: Alex holding a torch. The beam sweeps across and lights up a glowing figure.
cards.speechBubble: Shine the spotlight before raising anything.
checklist: Did I name a real behaviour?
Did I make them feel seen?

cards.title: Evaluate
cards.visual: Alex holding a scale. It tips left, tips right, then slowly balances in the centre.
cards.speechBubble: Balance the scale with what actually happened.
cards.watchOut: Don't let likeability tip the scale.

cards.title: Advice
cards.visual: Alex holding a compass. The needle spins then settles, Alex points forward.

cards.title: Link
cards.visual: Alex standing on one side of a gap. A bridge extends forward and connects to the other side.
checklist: Did I leave room for growth?

cards.title: Compose
cards.visual: Jamie seated, eyes closed. A slow visible breath in and out. Small ripple radiates outward.
cards.speechBubble: This is data. Not a verdict.

cards.title: Analyze
cards.visual: Jamie holding a magnifying glass over blurry text. It slowly sharpens into focus.
cards.watchOut: Don't let the relationship blur the message.

cards.title: Resolve
cards.visual: Jamie with hand raised. A glowing question mark appears above them.

cards.title: Execute
cards.visual: Jamie at the bottom of a staircase. Steps light up one by one as Jamie climbs.
cards.speechBubble: Build the habit. Not just the output.
cards.watchOut: Don't wait for the next deadline to start.

objectives: Identify how the REAL and CARE frameworks are applied in workplace feedback scenarios
Reflect on different approaches to giving and receiving feedback through interactive AR-based simulations
Apply constructive feedback and response techniques during workplace discussions and scenarios
Discuss feedback situations collaboratively to develop greater empathy, understanding, and confidence in handling feedback conversations

agenda.activity: Facilitator briefly introduces Sarah’s workplace situation and learning objectives
Facilitator demonstrates how AR cards work
Participants scan cards to view animated feedback scenarios
agenda.purpose: Observe framework application through immersive examples

agenda.activity: Managers/employees discuss scenario decisions, reactions, and alternative approaches
agenda.purpose: Encourage reflection, peer learning, and perspective-taking

agenda.activity: Participants identify key learning points and workplace application
